'''Harlaan''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] as part of [[Echo Flight]]. In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], they flew as [[Echo Six]] in the [[Battle at TFP-9|attack]] on [[Station TFP-9]]. 

When the adversaries received reinforcements, Till ordered Harlaan and others to keep concentrating against the fighters. [[Keela Egast]] noticed that the fresh Z-95s were equipped with [[missile/Legends|missiles]]. Harlaan said they were [[concussion missile/Legends|concussion]] that were not dangerous for their [[deflector shield/Legends|shields]], and could be fired at.

[[Dren Melne]] turned against them and started firing at their own ships in an attempt to persuade [[Essara Till/Legends|Essara Till]] to surrender. [[Bravo Leader]] attempted to regroup the flight, and Harlaan reported that they were battered during the [[Starfighter combat/Legends|dogfight]]. Till ordered the Echo Flight to power down and surrender, but a few, including Harlaan and [[Rhys Dallows]] refused to obey and continued to fight; Harlaan was trying to fight with the traitor, before eventualy Harlaan's signal vanished, and Dallows reported Harlaan's death.<ref name="Starfighter Trap" />
